_comment: Memory-quality CI drift gate floors. PINNED from 2 live runs on main (floor = observed_min - safety_margin; the max-metric uses observed_max + margin). NEVER weaken to make CI green; re-pin only with a committed 2-run re-measurement + rationale. Spec: docs/plans/2026-06-21-mq-quality-gate-spec.md (esp. 3.2, 3.3, 6).
pinnedFrom: 2026-06-22-mq-gate-ci.json (linux, nightly run 27928957455 — recall@1 0.98 / @5 1.0 / MRR 0.99, fire 18/18, stale 0, seed 50)
2026-06-19-mq-postfix.json (win32 v1.5.0 baseline — identical numbers; cross-platform run-stable)

2026-06-22-mq-answercorr-run{1,2}.json (win32 — answer-correctness@1 0.84 (42/50) + no-answer precision 1.0 (0 leaks/30) + parseFails 0, IDENTICAL across both runs + the smoke; tau_answer 0.05, gpt-4o-mini. Floors: answerCorrectness>=0.78 (0.06 margin) + noAnswerPrecision>=0.95 (tolerates 1 grader flip of 30, breaches at 2). Re-pin if the grader model or text-embedding-3-small changes.)
